name: Bowtie Pasta with Creamy Cilantro Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. To make vegan version, replace cottage cheese and yogurt with 1/2 pound firm tofu.
2. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling, salted water until al dente.
3. In blender or food processor, combine cottage cheese, yogurt, cilantro, and salt. Process for 30 seconds.
4. Heat oil in small skillet over medium heat; add garlic and cook until aromatic, about 1 minute. Add red pepper flakes and remove from heat.
5. Drain pasta and toss with sauce and garlic in serving bowl. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Variation: Sauté slivered onion and sweet red and yellow bell pepper strips with garlic for 3 minutes, or until crisp-tender. Proceed with recipe.
